summary: Evidence for Frantic claim verification guide.

observations.name: api-source
observations.value: Public bounty page https://gofrantic.com/bounties/41 and GitHub issue mirror https://github.com/auscaster/frantic-board/issues/92

observations.name: lifecycle-steps
observations.value: contract, claim, build/dogfood, delivery, machine checks, human review, payout decision

observations.name: review-boundary
observations.value: Machine checks validate fetchability, schema, named refs, and verifier output; human review decides bounty-purpose fit and letter-and-spirit compliance.

observations.name: delivery-shapes
observations.value: Guide includes one correct name=value delivery shape and one wrong bare-URL delivery shape.
